description: NDHM (now ABDM under India’s National Health Authority) provides digital health infrastructure for identity, consented health-information exchange, and related provider/user network interactions. Its platform supports participants such as consent managers, health information providers, and health information users in the national digital health ecosystem.
summary: NDHM/ABDM exposes five documented HTTP API surfaces for consent-manager, gateway, Health ID, HIP, and HIU integrations; docs indicate onboarding via the ABDM Sandbox and issued digital keys/tokens for authenticated access.
